note: Created integration test file tests/io_thread_lifecycle.rs with 10 tests covering: thread-per-device spawning, I/O thread shutdown within 100ms on drop, independent threads for multiple devices, concurrent send/recv without corruption or deadlock, mixed concurrent operations, poll loop packet processing, rapid create/free cycles, operations after free return INVALID_HANDLE, and concurrent device create/free. All 486 tests pass (440 unit + 46 integration).
